summary: Comprehensive testing of CineSignal v3.0 Film Demand Intelligence Platform completed. Backend APIs fully functional with 700 movies, 12 languages, authentication, and workspace features. Frontend mostly working with minor auth integration issue.

integration_issues.issue: Registration/login forms not redirecting after successful API response
integration_issues.details: Backend auth APIs return 200 success, but frontend doesn't redirect user or update auth state

passed_tests: Backend API health check returns 700 movies (v3.0 requirement)
Stats endpoint shows 12 languages including Marathi, Bengali, Malayalam, Punjabi, Gujarati, Assamese, Odia
Metadata endpoint includes all 12 languages correctly
Film simulation with dual ML engines (heuristic + neural network) and ROI calculation
User registration API creates new users successfully
User login API authenticates users correctly
Auth /me endpoint returns 401 without token, 200 with valid token
User logout API clears sessions properly
Workspace simulations endpoint requires auth (401 without token)
Workspace save simulation creates records for authenticated users
Workspace create note functionality works correctly
Workspace dashboard returns user stats and counts
Director presets endpoint still returns 10 presets
Case studies endpoint still returns 5 case studies
PDF export still generates valid PDF files
Frontend loads correctly with Sign In button in header
Frontend displays 700 movies stat in header correctly
Login page has Google OAuth button and email/password form
Frontend simulator works end-to-end with genre selection and prediction results
Navigation between all tabs (Simulator, Analytics, Market Insights, Studio Pitch, Director Suite) works
Prediction results display heuristic score (66.6), neural network score (73.3), and ROI (183.2%)
Component breakdown shows detailed scoring for all factors
Workspace tab appears for authenticated users (when auth works)
Guest mode functionality works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication integration - registration and login APIs work correctly but frontend doesn't redirect users after successful authentication. Check AuthContext.js and LoginPage.js for proper response handling and navigation logic.
